body:
Continue https://github.com/link-assistant/formal-ai/issues/103 and all previous issues, please expand on the most critical parts of the system, to fully, deeply, and wide provide actual formal reasoning, that can do every task we expect from human programmer, so we will be able to get closer for the system to program itself.

Please make a tool to collect logs on how github.com/link-assistant/hive-mind operates (see comments with logs in pull request, and how it was developing itself).

Here we need do everything it takes to actually implement the most basic problem solving algorithm, that relies on data, internet, hypothesis generation, experimentation and so on, to actually reproduce the programming that neural networks or LLMs are capable of with all the same.

If we could rely only on CPU and APIs and the internet and the data, we can make much more efficient AI system, that is much more reliant on logic, true, provable (in relation to requirements) reasoning steps.

Everything this should make our system to be less about memoization and more about actual reasoning. Select next most important step on our  vision, make it as big as you can, and fully execute on it. Think of next most important unimplemented missing part of the system, and go with execution of it.

We need to collect data related about the issue to this repository, make sure we compile that data to `./docs/case-studies/issue-{id}` folder, and use it to do deep case study analysis (also make sure to search online for additional facts and data), list of each and all requirements from the issue, and propose possible solutions and solution plans for each requirement (we should also check known existing components/libraries, that solve similar problem or can help in solutions).

Please plan and execute everything in a single pull request, you have unlimited time and context, as context auto-compacts and you can continue indefinitely, until it is each and every requirement fully addressed, and everything is totally done.
title: We need to continue on fully implementing our vision
